title: Construction/Roofing Company
excerpt:
Hey @AnthonytheEngineer 
Just wondering if you still use Monday.com for your firm. We are looking for some ideas and guidance for our roofing company. 
Thanks, 
Jordan

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: gelopi (Tim Lenci)
posts.cookedHtml: We used it for our firm for about a year. It’s a great platform with a lot of features, and it was easy to use. However, we eventually switched to a different platform because it was better suited for our specific needs, you can read more information about it.

posts.author: AdamR (Adam Root)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey!
For roofing, try custom boards for project timelines, material inventory, and client communication. Utilize integrations for weather updates too! Best of luck with your roofing ventures!

posts.author: CowTownRoofing (Cow Town roofing)
posts.cookedHtml:
"Hey @AnthonytheEngineer,

Navigating project management tools like Monday.com can be a game-changer for roofing firms. At Cow Town Roofing, we’ve explored various platforms to streamline our operations, and Monday.com has stood out for its versatility and ease of use.

From project tracking to team collaboration, Monday.com offers a robust solution that aligns well with the dynamic nature of roofing projects. Integrating it into our workflow has significantly enhanced our efficiency and communication.

If you’re seeking ideas and guidance for your roofing company, leveraging tools like Monday.com could be a valuable asset. Feel free to check out our website Cow Town Roofing for more insights on optimizing roofing operations.

Best regards, Jordan"

posts.author: jennifermate (jennifer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey!
For roofing contractor needs good labor, equipment and resources. online presence is very helpful now a days to get large roofing contracts. A website and social media platforms provide more clearance and trust. In roofing contractors needed a reliable construction estimating services and construction takeoff services for getting an estimate of project cost and all aspects. Estimators play an important role in roofing projects, they help with their services to improve efficiency and increase bidding.

posts.author: branda1212 (Branda Kethreen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Absolutely. Many private contractors and specialized estimating firms provide detailed takeoff and pricing services for both excavation and roofing projects—especially for large-scale commercial or residential jobs. These services help avoid underbidding, material waste, and timeline delays.

For example, if you’re looking for expert support, this Construction/Roofing Company offers comprehensive takeoff solutions tailored to excavation and roofing needs. They can break down materials, labor, and costs accurately, helping contractors and builders submit competitive bids while maintaining profit margins.

Whether you’re handling site grading, trenching, or complete roof system estimates, working with professionals like this can save time and reduce risk significantly.

posts.author: chaddodson (Chad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey! Yes, we actually use Monday.com in our roofing company — Chad Dodson Roofing, serving Abilene and the Big Country since 1998. It’s been a great tool for keeping our team aligned across job scheduling, material orders, and project updates. We’ve customized it for everything from storm damage leads to insurance claim tracking.

If you’re in the roofing space and looking to set up something similar, I’d be happy to walk you through how we’ve structured our boards and workflows — feel free to reach out. We’ve built out systems that save a ton of time and prevent stuff from falling through the cracks. Even if you’re not a customer, I’m happy to share what’s worked for us.

posts.author: AlexanderAllan (Alexander Allan)
posts.cookedHtml:
CanadaProRoofing:

Hey @AnthonytheEngineer

Just wondering if you still use Monday.com for your firm. We are looking for some ideas and guidance for our roofing company.

Thanks,
Jordan

Hi Jordan, yes, we still use Monday.com—it’s been helpful for project tracking and team coordination. For a roofing company, you can customize workflows for scheduling, budgeting, and client updates.
